title: Live chat with terrible person acted like an AI did not answer my questions directly
review: I tried to chat live to get a simple answer for my question. When it connected me to a real person, there is about a full minute wait before anybody actually typed anything. After the first response, the person took a full two minutes to respond for the next one.  In their first response, they also said “I see you have a question about card information? “  I never said this and I never selected it. I have no idea where this came from so I had to re say my question. They made it a point to not answer my question directly. They actually just said “I see that you have a question about this”. And then there was another full minute before they said anything else. I asked a very simple question and it was very clear and I don’t know why people do this in customer service. It is so unprofessional and aggravating. Eventually, they were able to tell me that I have to call in and do this on the phone. But it took them about two paragraphs to say this. It also took them forever to answer. What could’ve been a six minute conversation has been about a 20 minute text conversation. This person could be anywhere doing anything. They could be literally having sex and just doing this on their phone in between ejaculations. They could be playing a video game or driving. There’s no accountability. The answer answers took forever and they weren’t real answers. It was a terrible chat experience and very aggravating and now I have to call in and spend more of my time doing it.

A very, very simple bug to fix but BoA has yet to do it after years of complaining to them about it. 

On the iOS app BoA blocks pasting of passwords greater than 21 characters, inherently requiring a less secure password if you use a password manager.

The irony is that it used to be 19 characters, so they actually made a change to increase it by TWO CHARACTERS ONLY instead of just fixing it.

title: Scam
review: I recently opened a temporary account for a high school reunion. An error in the BOA system caused 2 accounts to be generated. I went back to the branch and they could not close the second account. They said I had to call. Meanwhile charges accrued as there was a “zero” balance on an account I did not generate. When I called they said I have to wait to return the fee and have the account closed. More time goes by and I finally found time to call AGAIN and deal with it. I decide to transfer funds to get back to zero to pay for fees that I never should have had to pay because it was not to my fault that this account was opened in the first place. I talked to 4 people and an hour later. Everyone was “Sorry”, but could not solve the issue. So bottom line. I ended up having to pay for a mistake the Bank of America made in order to not keep having to pay for the mistake that Bank of America made. So sad. And to mention that I have been a customer for 33 years and given them thousands in interest over the years on a line of credit. It’s time to stop doing business with them.  Sincerely. Mr. Dodge

title: What is this??? You hate us?!?!
review:
“You are continuing to a website that Bank of America or Merril doesn’t own or operate. Its owner is solely responsible for the website’s content, offerings and level of security so please refer to the website’s posted privacy policy and terms of use. It’s possible that the information on the website is only available in English. Continue?”

What is this that I have to agree to to continue using the mobile banking app?!?! Why does it feel like I am being given to some hackers?!?!?

I have been banking with Bank of America for decades and they do this sometimes. They used to have a keyboard that was supposed to be secure but it popped into the app weird like it was a virus. I and probably quite a few spoke up about how I thought maybe I had been hacked, but it came after an update and it changed back shortly after. I can deal with a secure keyboard that protects against key-loggers if it is deployed by the institution that is responsible for the storing and moving of my money, but I will not abide the institution that is responsible for storing and moving my money telling me that they have wholly given over the rights and responsibilities of moving my money without ANY information regarding who who the entity is that is now in complete control of my finances so far as I know. 

The way this was presented is a disgusting breach of trust. 

It may be time to finally change banks.

title: HATE the new credit card payment process …
review:
Went to make a payment on husband’s card, and found that the linked bank account we make payments from had been deleted, not by either of us, we aren’t sure how or why (we have been making payments from that account for years and even made a payment from that account a couple days before without issues). Re-linked the same exact bank account, but now the payment process is totally different. Now we have to select which bank to pay from (there’s only one), then select between the statement balance or custom payment, and select the date to make the payment on. These are all on separate pages with too many button clicks. After that, the screen goes immediately to the payment activity page instead of back to the main credit card page I went into the payment page from that shows all transactions on the card and the balance. 

When I go into my card to make a payment, everything is on one page, with the normal bank account defaulted as the selected option, and the statement balance or enter custom amount option available to choose from, and the current date selected as the default already, with a link to change if desired (which I never change). This process is WAY smoother and preferred across all credit cards as the payment process. 

I do like that when the payments are entered, the pending payment and updated balance after the payment will be made shows immediately on the overall credit card transaction page, but wish that was the only change instead of the overall payment process. The new process has WAY too many button clicks and is very time consuming and not ideal for the end user in the slightest.
